title: [doctor-mode-integration-3] flywheel-cli-doctor-upgrade: run ten-phase doctor-mode loop per state-mutating own-binary (flywheel-loop first)
description:
Step 3 of 3-bead chain. Depends on bead 2 (flywheel-cli-canonical-baseline).

Apply spec: .flywheel/audit/flywheel-cli-doctor-upgrade/apply-spec.md

Goal: every state-mutating own-CLI's doctor subcommand passes the world-class-doctor-mode rubric — detect-then-fix invariant, single mutate() chokepoint, content-hashed backups, byte-exact doctor undo <run-id>, idempotence, fixture suite per failure mode, scorecard >= baseline+250pts.

First target: flywheel-loop (existing doctor → mode=upgrade; ten seed FMs already in MEMORY: loop-state-without-driver, pulse-stale, stale-error preflight, callback Monitor, time-based heartbeat with stale prompt, schema drift, topology mismatch, watcher input-deaf dispatch, frozen-projection-of-mutable-state, recovery stale-chevron false-positive).

Pre-seed Phase 1 with --cass-extra-memory pointing at flywheel project memory dir for MEMORY-aware archaeology.

Wire scorecard delta into daily-ops fleet rollup (u2yc0): RED FLAG when median scorecard regresses >50pts week-over-week.

Boundary: jeff-stack binaries get upstream issues only; never patch. worktree mode (branch doctor-mode-pass-<N>); one bead = one PR per pass. Re-dispatch passes 2..N until termination threshold (median uplift <25 AND no regression >50).

dependencies.title: [doctor-mode-integration-2] flywheel-cli-canonical-baseline: ship --info/--schema/--examples on all P0/P1 own-binaries

dependents.title: [doctor-mode-pass-1] flywheel-loop ten-phase doctor-mode upgrade — pass 1 (Phase 1 archaeology done)
